SpecificRule.BreathMagic: If your next action is to Cast a Spell from your dragon mage spell slots that has an area and has no duration, you can choose to change the spell's area to instead use the area of your Dragon Breath (@Template[{actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.shape}|distance:{actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.distance}]). If you do, you use your breath to deliver the spell, so you can't use Dragon Breath for [[/r 1d4 #Recharge Dragon Breath]]{1d4 rounds}, even though the spell replaces all of the usual effects of Dragon Breath. If you have Deep Breath, you can choose to apply it to increase the area of your spell, but if you do so, you must wait 1d4 × 10 minutes until using Deep Breath again, as normal for Deep Breath.

DragonBreath.Burst: You breathe in deeply and release the energy stored within you in a powerful exhalation. Your dragon breath is a @Template[{actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.shape}|distance:{actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.distance}] within 30 feet and deals @Damage[max(2,ceil(@actor.level/2)){actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.dieSize}[@actor.flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.damageType]] damage of a type depending on your heritage. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[{actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.saveType}|against:class-spell|basic] saving throw against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. You can't use this ability again for 10 minutes; starting at level 3, you instead can't use the ability again for [[/r 1d4 #Recharge Dragon Breath]] rounds.
DragonBreath.Other: You breathe in deeply and release the energy stored within you in a powerful exhalation. Your dragon breath is a @Template[{actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.shape}|distance:{actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.distance}] and deals @Damage[max(2,ceil(@actor.level/2)){actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.dieSize}[@actor.flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.damageType]] damage. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[{actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.saveType}|against:class-spell|basic] saving throw against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. You can't use this ability again for 10 minutes; starting at level 3, you instead can't use the ability again for [[/r 1d4 #Recharge Dragon Breath]] rounds.

DeepBreath.Burst: You breathe in deeply and release the energy stored within you in a powerful exhalation. Your dragon breath is a @Template[{actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.shape}|distance:{actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.distance}] within 60 feet and deals @Damage[(2*max(2,ceil(@actor.level/2))){actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.dieSize}[@actor.flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.damageType]] damage of a type depending on your heritage. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[{actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.saveType}|against:class-spell|basic] saving throw against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. You can't use this ability again for 10 minutes; starting at level 3, you instead can't use the ability again for [[/r 1d4 #Recharge Dragon Breath]] rounds.
DeepBreath.Other: You breathe in deeply and release the energy stored within you in a powerful exhalation. Your dragon breath is a @Template[{actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.shape}|distance:{actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.distance}] and deals @Damage[(2*max(2,ceil(@actor.level/2))){actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.dieSize}[@actor.flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.damageType]] damage. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[{actor|flags.pf2e.dragonAncestry.breath.saveType}|against:class-spell|basic] saving throw against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. You can't use this ability again for 10 minutes; starting at level 3, you instead can't use the ability again for [[/r 1d4 #Recharge Dragon Breath]] rounds.
